The '''''Resurgence''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by the [[Alderaanian Resistance]] following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was in the service of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] and [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by [[Adrian Verana]]. After a [[Mission to Coruscant (Imperial era)|mission]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the group onboard ''Resurgence'' came [[Battle of the Resurgence|under attack]] from a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] under the command of [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Valin Draco]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilder Varth]]. The ''Resurgence'' was destroyed in the fighting.
